ab: iaku thuini masa naak a ina mutusi kilhnaqualh.
ch: 今天我和我的媽媽出去玩。
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: mathuaw dishlum shashanu a qali, qali antu mashimzaw antu mani mahnar, fari mathuaw mahaziwhiw.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: iamin milhungqu ipruq kmaan sa paang, patilhazin naam a buut, mathuaw maqalhuuz.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.
In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: makikalhi iaku naak a ina, minu sa qali maqulhaqulha.
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ch: 媽媽說，可能是要颱風了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: tanlhuaniza wa qali uka s urum, mu’apawiza sa kilhpuz.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: amutauniza isa saran, fuilh iaku sa kilhpuz mzai.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星說。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: mihala s qali ingqawan shmiraus, amuqthawan iaku mani musha malhalhiqash.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
